intro: This is a primary healthcare Dashboard for Nigerian health services. It provides daily health tips to its users and offers a bilingual functionality to aid native Hausa speakers. It displays various medical conditions that are popular amongst us and offers an accurate symptom checker for assessment
disclaimerText: This symptom checker is for informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical advice.
finishDisclaimer: Please consult a doctor for proper diagnosis and treatment.
disclaimerText2: NEW: This tool does not provide medical advice. It is intended for informational purposes only. This tool leverages certain generative artificial intelligence tools to generate results, and is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis or treatment. Never ignore professional medical advice in seeking treatment because of something you have read on the LikitaAI Website. If you think you may have a medical emergency, immediately call your doctor.
thankYou: Thank you for using LikitaAI Symptom Checker.
conditions-text: The following conditions are based on the symptoms you have provided. Please remember that this is not a definitive diagnosis. Always consult a healthcare professional for an accurate diagnosis and treatment plan.

home.failedTips: Failed to fetch preventive health tips.
home.noDrugInfo: We’re sorry, detailed medication information is currently unavailable.
home.searchByState: Search by facility name, state, or LGA

conditions.title: Medical Conditions
conditions.failedLoad: Failed to load conditions. Please try again later.
